final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form vertical video cover for an esports monitor launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a "极简高级感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Dieter Rams industrial design philosophy, Apple product photography heritage, Muji visual identity; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds framing with large headline as dominant element
Subject: must include the 8k GGU esports monitor as focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary)
Constraints: must be vertical format optimized for short video cover, large headline for eye-catching impact
Avoid:
